fn_def_list.fn_code:
static void print_help_info_adig(void) {
    printf("adig, version %s 

", ARES_VERSION_STR);
    printf("usage: adig [-h] [-d] [-f flag] [-s server] [-c class] [-t type] [-T|U port] [-x | -xx] name ...

"
    "  d : Print some extra debugging output.
"
    "  f : Add a flag. Possible values for flag are igntc, noaliases, norecurse, primary, stayopen, usevc.
"
    "  h : Display this help and exit.

"
    "  T port   : Use specified TCP port to connect to DNS server.
"
    "  U port   : Use specified UDP port to connect to DNS server.
"
    "  c class  : Set the query class. Possible values for class are NY, CHAOS, HS, IN  (default).
"
    "  s server : Connect to specified DNS server, instead of the system's default one(s).
"
    "  t type   : Query records of specified type.  
"
    "              Possible values for type are A  
"
    "              (default), AAAA, AFSDB,  ANY,
"
    "              AXFR, CNAME, GPOS, HINFO, ISDN,
"
    "              KEY, LOC, MAILA, MAILB, MB, MD,
"
    "              MF, MG, MINFO, MR, MX, NAPTR, NS,
"
    "              NSAP, NSAP_PTR, NULL, PTR, PX, RP,
"
    "              RT,  SIG,  SOA, SRV, TXT, URI, WKS, X25

"
    " -x  : For a '-t PTR a.b.c.d' lookup, query for 'd.c.b.a.in-addr.arpa.'
"
    " -xx : As above, but for IPv6, compact the format into a bitstring like
"
    "       '[xabcdef00000000000000000000000000].IP6.ARPA.'
");
    exit(0);
}
